# ParamEncoding.IsSentinelEncoded method

Returns `true` when *headerValue* is wrapped in the Base64 sentinel.

```csharp
public static bool IsSentinelEncoded(string headerValue)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| headerValue | The header value to inspect. |

## Return Value

`true` when it begins with the prefix, ends with the suffix, and is long enough to carry both.
